ruleSet.name: handoff
ruleSet.description: Handoff app backend — uploads (presigned), node tree, ACL-gated serving, grants, share links.

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff presigned prepare
pipelineConfig.description: Mint a presigned PUT for direct-to-bucket upload

rules.description: Mint a presigned PUT URL for a direct-to-bucket content upload

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff register node
pipelineConfig.description: Register an uploaded file as a node and return the shaped Node

rules.description: Finalize a direct-to-bucket upload into a handoff_nodes file record

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff list nodes
pipelineConfig.description: List nodes whose parentId matches the query (default root)

rules.description: List child nodes of a folder (default root)

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff get node
pipelineConfig.description: Return one node by id, shaped

rules.description: Fetch a single node by id (?id=)

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff sign GET
pipelineConfig.description: Presigned GET for direct bucket playback (video/audio)

rules.description: Mint a short-lived presigned GET URL for a content object (video/audio direct play)

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff create folder
pipelineConfig.description: Create a folder node and return the shaped Node

rules.description: Create a folder node under a parent

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff register site
pipelineConfig.description: Create a site node with manifest and return the shaped Node (url = iframe view path)

rules.description: Register a Site node (multi-file HTML bundle) with its manifest

pipelineConfig.name: Handoff serve site

config.code: function handler({ request }) { var p = (request && request.path) || ''; var marker = '/api/sites/'; var i = p.indexOf(marker); var rest = (i >= 0) ? p.slice(i + marker.length) : ''; var slash = rest.indexOf('/'); var siteId = (slash >= 0) ? rest.slice(0, slash) : rest; var relPath = (slash >= 0) ? rest.slice(slash + 1) : ''; var isUuid = /^[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}$/.test(siteId); return { siteId: siteId, relPath: relPath, hasSite: isUuid }; }

function handler({ steps }) { var node = (steps && steps.query) || {}; if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') node = {}; var man = node.manifest; if (typeof man === 'string') { try { man = JSON.parse(man); } catch (e) { man = {}; } } if (!man || typeof man !== 'object') man = {}; var entry = node.siteEntry || 'index.html'; var rel = (steps.parse && steps.parse.relPath) || ''; if (!rel || rel.charAt(rel.length - 1) === '/') rel = entry; var target = (man[rel] != null) ? man[rel] : null; return { target: target, missing: !target, rel: rel }; }

pipelineConfig.description: Map /api/sites/<id>/<relPath> to the stored object via manifest, 302 redirect

rules.description: Serve a Site asset by relative path via manifest redirect (same-origin)
Add/update a grant on a folder (owner/admin only)
Revoke a grant from a folder (owner/admin only)
Mint a folder-scoped View-only share link (owner/admin)
List a folder's active share links
